title: Nexus Entity State (Dynamic Compute Runtime)
description: Per-BlockType dynamic state schemas for computable KeyBlocks (V1.61 KB structured layer, compass Q4/Q5). State is MUTABLE runtime data (e.g. current_hp, status_effects) nested by block_type so the same KeyBlock can serve different module types without field-name collisions (compass Q5: state.character.current_hp). The character shape is fully specified; other block types are permissive placeholders.

block_type.description: Selects which per-type state definition applies. See definitions for the fully-specified shapes; unlisted types fall back to a permissive object.

state.description: The per-BlockType dynamic state payload. Nested by block_type to avoid field-name collisions across module types (compass Q5). Conform to the matching definition (e.g. CharacterState) for structured validation. Module-declared state fields beyond the definition are allowed (additionalProperties: true).

current_hp.description: Current hit points (mutated by combat compute via state_delta)

status_effects.description: Active status effect identifiers (e.g. poisoned, stunned)

is_alive.description: Liveness flag; false once current_hp reaches 0

CharacterState.description: Fully-specified dynamic state for character KeyBlocks. Additional module-declared runtime fields are permitted.

ItemState.description: Placeholder dynamic state for item KeyBlocks (permissive).

FactionState.description: Placeholder dynamic state for faction KeyBlocks (permissive).

AbilityState.description: Placeholder dynamic state for ability KeyBlocks (permissive).

SpeciesState.description: Placeholder dynamic state for species KeyBlocks (permissive).
